recommendations.title: Asterix and Cleopatra

recommendations.title: War of the Buttons
recommendations.overview: 1960. The thrilling battles waged by a band of kids from two rival villages in the southern French countryside.

recommendations.title: Mood Indigo
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers from an unusual illness caused by a flower growing in her lungs.

recommendations.title: French Twist
recommendations.overview: After learning of her husband's infidelities, a housewife invites an itinerant lesbian to move in with them. None of their lives will ever be the same again.

recommendations.title: Cleopatra
recommendations.overview: Determined to hold on to the throne, Cleopatra seduces the Roman emperor Julius Caesar. When Caesar is murdered, she redirects her attentions to his general, Marc Antony, who vows to take power—but Caesar’s successor has other plans.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.
